steps.t: Swarming plague-flies and their nests can be found in the wilds of Agarnaith. You should destroy swarming plague-flies and plague-fly nests.
Plague-ridden nerbyg and their nests can be found in the wilds of Agarnaith. You should destroy plague-ridden nerbyg and norbog nests.
Plagued ash-claws and their dens can be found in the wilds of Agarnaith. You should destroy plagued ash-claws and ash-claw dens.
Viznak can be found in his hideout. You should talk to Viznak.
